title: Gamma (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gamma''' may refer to:

== Canon ==

* [[Gamma attack pattern]]
* [[Gamma-bit 669753]]
* [[Gamma-class assault shuttle]]
* [[Gammaplast]]
* [[Gamma radiation]]
* [[Gamma Squadron]]

== Legends ==
*[[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]].
*[[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttle]].
*[[Gamma Base]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base.
*[[Gamma Company]], a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Company/Legends|company]].
*[[Gamma Corps]], a [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] unit.
*[[Gamma Fleet]], a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] fleet commanded [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]].
*[[Gamma group]], a group of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]].
*[[Gamma Intelligence Group]], a branch of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]].
*[[Gamma Squad (Galactic Republic)|Gamma Squad]], a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] unit.
*[[Gamma Squad (Imperial)]].
*[[Gamma Hangar]], one of the docking bays of the [[Anakin Solo (Imperial II-class Star Destroyer)|''Anakin Solo'']].
*[[Station Gamma]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] near [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].
*[[Zeboron Gamma]], a city on [[Shador]].

== See Also ==

* [[Tionese/Legends]]
